name: Dependency-Track (OWASP)
pricing_notes: Fully open source (Apache 2.0); self-hosted only; no cloud service

auth.notes: API key from Dependency-Track admin panel; LDAP/AD integration for SSO

performance.notes: REST API response ~200ms; SBOM analysis async (minutes for large SBOMs); vulnerability sync background

agent_readiness.notes: OWASP's open-source SBOM (Software Bill of Materials) management and vulnerability analysis platform. Ingests CycloneDX/SPDX SBOMs. Tracks vulnerabilities across all projects. REST API for CI/CD integration. Policy engine for vulnerability gates. Webhook notifications for new vulnerabilities. Best FOSS option for enterprise SBOM management.

gotchas: Java-based server requires JVM infrastructure to self-host
SBOM import required — doesn't scan code directly (use Syft/Trivy to generate SBOM first)
Vulnerability database syncs (NVD, OSV) can lag by hours
UI and API are functional but not polished compared to commercial alternatives
best_when: Organizations needing free enterprise SBOM management platform
CI/CD vulnerability gates that fail builds on critical CVEs
Compliance requirements (SOC 2, FedRAMP) needing continuous component tracking
Agents that need to query vulnerability status of software dependencies
avoid_when: Teams wanting SaaS (no cloud version exists)
Quick vulnerability scanning (Grype/Trivy faster for point-in-time scanning)
Organizations without Java/container infrastructure for self-hosting
summary: Dependency-Track is OWASP's open-source SBOM management platform for continuous software supply chain monitoring. Ingests CycloneDX/SPDX SBOMs, tracks vulnerabilities across all projects, and enforces policy gates. REST API for CI/CD integration. Webhook notifications for new CVEs. Self-hosted Java application. Best free option for enterprise-grade SBOM management and compliance tracking.
